overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in a white cape and straw hat walking through misty Japanese rice paddies and entering a traditional farmhouse. The clip transitions from bright outdoor farmland to dimly lit interior and back outside, showcasing the Tagata Farmstead area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rice paddy fields with narrow dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between rice paddies toward a distant torii gate

entered.detail: flooded rice paddies with young green shoots extending into the misty distance
traditional wooden torii gate marking the entrance to the farmstead
group of traditional wooden farmhouses with thatched roofs visible through the haze
simple wooden posts marking the edge of the rice fields

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path flanked by lush green rice paddies in a misty rural landscape. A wooden torii gate stands ahead marking the entrance to the farmstead, with traditional wooden farmhouses visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead entrance with torii gate and approaching farmhouse

events.description: passes through the wooden torii gate entering the Tagata Farmstead area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through the farmstead entrance toward the main farmhouse

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with sacks and goods parked beside the path
large traditional wooden farmhouse with dark timber walls and tiled roof

segments.scene_description: Passing through the torii gate, the character enters the farmstead proper and approaches a traditional wooden farmhouse. A cart loaded with goods sits beside the path as the character nears the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional farmhouse interior with cooking hearth

events.description: enters the dark interior of the farmhouse from the bright exterior
lighting shifts from bright natural daylight to dim interior candlelight

agents.ego_description: enters the farmhouse and explores the dimly lit interior, examining the cooking area and hanging goods

entered.detail: dark wooden doorway threshold leading into the farmhouse
traditional cooking fire with glowing embers and hanging pots
low wooden table with vegetables and cooking preparations
strings of dried vegetables and goods hanging from the ceiling beams
paper shoji screen door showing bright daylight outside, serving as the far exit

segments.scene_description: Inside the traditional farmhouse, the space is dimly lit by a cooking fire and candles. The character moves through the interior past a wooden table with vegetables and a hanging rack of dried goods, approaching a shoji screen door on the far side.

events.description: exits the farmhouse through the shoji screen door back to the exterior
lighting shifts from dark interior back to bright daylight

agents.ego_description: exits the farmhouse and walks around the exterior toward an open yard area

entered.detail: exterior wall of the farmhouse now viewed from the side with wooden beams and thatched roof edge
same wooden cart now visible from the opposite side near the farmhouse wall

segments.scene_description: Stepping back outside through the shoji screen, the character emerges into the bright farmstead yard. The character walks along the exterior of the farmhouse past a wooden cart, heading toward an open area with training equipment visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty rural landscape into the dim interior of a farmhouse before emerging back into the bright daylight of a farmstead yard. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by lush green rice paddies, moving steadily toward a wooden torii gate that marks the entrance to the farmstead. As the camera passes through the gate, the scene shifts toward a traditional wooden farmhouse, gliding past a loaded cart before entering the building. The environment then transitions into a dimly lit interior illuminated by a cooking fire and candles, where the camera moves past a wooden table and dried goods toward a shoji screen door. Finally, the character steps back outside through the screen, emerging into the bright yard and walking past the exterior of the house toward distant training equipment.
